title: The Killers
writer: Anthony Veiller, Ernest Hemingway, Richard Brooks
actors: Burt Lancaster, Ava Gardner, Edmond O'Brien
plot: Hit men arrive in a small New Jersey town to kill an unresisting victim, and insurance investigator Reardon uncovers his past involvement with beautiful, deadly Kitty Collins.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 4 wins & 4 nominations total
